goal: Visit this page, take a screenshot, rate the design /10 as a senior product designer. Note 2 concrete defects. This is cloud.tangle.tools — a dark-themed blockchain services dashboard. One-line verdict per page.

action.criteria: As a senior product designer, rate this Blueprints page of the dark-themed blockchain services dashboard out of 10. Assess: visual hierarchy, card design consistency, typography/readability on dark background, spacing and layout, color contrast, information architecture, button design and hierarchy, overall polish. Identify 2 specific design defects visible on this page.

steps.expectedEffect: Will receive a detailed design evaluation with a rating out of 10 and identification of 2 concrete design defects on the Blueprints page
